Localization.Description: Attempt to grant access to a resource

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Access to the resource with code {object.state} is granted on host {event_src.host}
Error accessing a resource on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Error accessing resource "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Access to resource "{object.name}" with code {object.state} is granted on host {event_src.host}
